name: Aldine Independent School District
districtFact: Aldine ISD serves north Houston and unincorporated Harris County communities, with districtwide breaks, staff development days, ADSY campus calendars, and campus-specific calendar adjustments that families should confirm through their school.

about.title: About Aldine ISD
about.content: Aldine Independent School District serves families across north Houston and unincorporated Harris County. The Aldine ISD academic calendar helps families track first and last day dates, student holidays, staff development days, grading periods, report card dates, half days, and major breaks. Districtwide dates are useful for childcare, transportation, appointments, and family travel planning, while campus pages remain the best place to confirm testing schedules, athletics, performances, ADSY campus dates, and school-specific events.

about.title: How to Use This Aldine ISD Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes Aldine ISD calendar information in a searchable format. Families should still confirm campus-specific events, testing dates, ADSY campus calendars, and emergency schedule changes through Aldine ISD and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Aldine ISD Families
content: Check whether your student attends an ADSY campus because Ermel, Harris, and Vines may use an additional-days calendar.
Add staff development and student holiday weeks separately because Aldine schedules multi-day student holidays in October and February.
Plan for the December half day because it affects dismissal, transportation, and after-school care.
Use the official Aldine ISD calendar page for final confirmation because some schools may adjust calendars for specific class schedules.

compareIntro: Aldine ISD vs Nearby District Calendars: compare Aldine ISD with Houston ISD, CFISD (Cypress-Fairbanks ISD), Conroe ISD, and Katy ISD calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include first day, last day, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, instruction-day counts when available, and district profile fields. This helps north Houston and Harris County families compare Aldine ISD spring break, school-year boundaries, and major vacation windows with nearby Texas districts.

customSections.label: Parent Planning Guide for Aldine ISD 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families can use the Aldine ISD 2026-2027 calendar as a school-year planning guide, not just a date list. The district calendar is the right place to check attendance days, student holidays, half days, staff development dates, grading periods, report card timing, and major breaks, while campus pages should be used for testing schedules, athletics, performances, ADSY campus dates, and other school-specific events.

groups.label: Plan vacations
items: Thanksgiving Break, Midwinter Break, and Spring Break are the main extended travel windows in the Aldine ISD 2026-2027 calendar.
The October 12-16 and February 8-12 student holiday weeks can also be used for shorter family trips or appointments.
Before booking non-refundable travel, confirm the official Aldine ISD source and campus notices in case the district revises dates.

groups.label: Arrange childcare
items: Use the first student day and registration period to plan back-to-school transportation, childcare, and work schedules.
Add the December half day separately because it can affect dismissal, pickup, transportation, and after-school care.
Staff development days and student holidays may require coverage even when they are not part of a major break.

groups.label: Track important school periods
items: Use grading period dates and report card dates to prepare for academic checkpoints during the school year.
Families at Ermel, Harris, and Vines should verify the ADSY calendar because those campuses may not follow every districtwide date exactly.
Confirm campus-specific events before making plans that depend on testing, athletics, performances, ADSY schedules, or emergency updates.

customSections.label: Aldine ISD District Profile for Calendar Planning
customSections.content: Aldine ISD is a public school district serving north Houston and unincorporated Harris County in the Houston-The Woodlands-Sugar Land metro area. Families use the Aldine ISD calendar for districtwide attendance planning, but specialized programs, ADSY campuses, transportation notices, athletics, and testing schedules may require campus-level confirmation.

groups.label: Local calendar context
items: Location: north Houston and Harris County, Texas.
Calendar type: traditional academic calendar, with separate ADSY calendar references for Ermel, Harris, and Vines.
Main calendar users: students, parents, teachers, campus staff, and families coordinating childcare or transportation.
Most important planning windows: October student holiday week, Thanksgiving Break, Midwinter Break, Spring Break, December half day, and the final student day.

customSections.label: Is Aldine ISD Closed Today?
customSections.content: This page shows the planned Aldine ISD academic calendar, not a real-time closure feed. Aldine ISD may change schedules because of weather, emergency situations, district announcements, or campus-specific updates, so families should check official district channels before traveling or changing childcare plans.

groups.label: Where to check real-time updates
items: Check Aldine ISD official announcements for weather closures and emergency schedule changes.
Confirm campus notifications for school-specific updates, especially if your student attends an ADSY campus.
Review district updates before traveling when severe weather or emergency conditions are possible.

customSections.label: How to Add the Aldine ISD Calendar to Google Calendar
customSections.content: MySchoolDates provides an Aldine ISD Calendar 2026-2027 ICS file generated from the reviewed Aldine ISD calendar records. The one-time calendar file can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook, but it will not automatically update if Aldine ISD revises the official calendar.

groups.label: Calendar import steps
items: Download the Aldine ISD .ics calendar file from this page.
Open Google Calendar and choose the calendar import option.
Upload the .ics file to add Aldine ISD holidays, breaks, student holidays, half days, and major dates to your personal calendar.
Use the same .ics file for Apple Calendar or Outlook when you want a one-time import.

customSections.label: Aldine ISD Calendar Research & Verification
customSections.content: Reviewed by the MySchoolDates Education Research Team, this page uses Aldine ISD official calendar sources as its source base. MySchoolDates reviews district calendar records before publishing searchable dates, FAQ answers, and the one-time calendar import file. This page is independently maintained and is not affiliated with Aldine ISD.

groups.label: Verification process
items: Official Aldine ISD district calendar sources reviewed.
First day, last day, October student holidays, Thanksgiving Break, Midwinter Break, Spring Break, half day, ADSY references, and teacher workday dates compared against source records.
Calendar import file generated from the Aldine ISD date records used on this page.
Last-minute campus events, weather closures, and emergency changes should still be confirmed with Aldine ISD and the assigned school.
